column19:
This study is conducted by Diogo Andrade, NOVA IMS. Participation is voluntary and may be stopped at any time. All responses are anonymous and used exclusively for academic research. No personally identifiable information will be collected or disclosed. By proceeding, you confirm that:

	You have read and understood the information above.
	You are at least 18 years old.
	You voluntarily agree to participate in this study.



In case of any questions, contact: 20211561@novaims.unl.pt

column38: 9. Before this study, were you aware that AI/LLM-based systems can be used not only to suggest data preparation steps, but also to help apply them within a data preparation tool?

column40:

column41:
